name: Basic Tomato Sauce- Reetz Btvc62a
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and garlic; sauté until translucent.
3. Puree 1 can of crushed tomatoes in a blender.
4. Pour the pureed tomatoes into the saucepan with the onion mixture.
5. Stir in the second can of crushed tomatoes, Italian dressing, bay leaf, salt, pepper, and sugar.
6. Cover and simmer for 1 hour.
7. Add the chopped parsley and basil; stir gently.
8. Simmer covered for another 15 minutes.
